# LoadBalancer Sample

| Resource | `loadbalancer/LoadBalancer` |

apiVersion: loadbalancer.oracle.com/v1beta1
kind: LoadBalancer
metadata:
  name: loadbalancer-sample
spec:
  compartmentId: ocid1.compartment.oc1..<unique_ID>
  displayName: example_load_balancer
  shapeName: Flexible
  subnetIds:
    - ocid1.subnet.oc1..<unique_ID>
  shapeDetails:
    minimumBandwidthInMbps: 10
    maximumBandwidthInMbps: 10
